do_not_merge.reason: Distinct service variants on the same base route BX41. route_bx41-plus is the limited-stop '+' variant (BX41+), while route_webster-ave-sbs is the Select Bus Service variant (BX41-SBS) on Webster Avenue in the Bronx. The shared identity key route_bx41 is only the broad base route label, not a variant-specific identifier. The canonical JSONL already keeps analogous pairs distinct (e.g., route_b44-plus vs route_b44-sbs). The negative signal 'variant mismatch: plus-label vs ace-dataset,sbs' confirms these are different service types that should not be merged.

weak_aliases.reason: References to base route BX41 from the ACE dataset; useful for search but not merge authority because the variant designations (+) differ.
References to base route BX41 from BRT route index and ACE sources; useful for search but not merge authority because the variant designation (SBS) differs from the plus variant.

suggested_rules: Do not merge '+' variants (limited-stop) with 'SBS' variants (Select Bus Service) on the same base route; they are distinct service types. Shared base route identity keys (e.g., route_bx41) must be qualified by variant suffix before they are authoritative for merge decisions.
suggestion.rationale: Both records share base route BX41 but represent different service variants: '+'(limited-stop) vs 'SBS' (Select Bus Service). The ACE routes dataset dictionary lists BX41+ as a distinct item alongside other '+' values. The webster-ave-sbs record has full route name 'Webster Avenue Select Bus Service', route label 'BX41-SBS', borough 'Bronx', and streets 'Webster Av'. The canonical JSONL maintains analogous separations (route_b44-plus separate from route_b44-sbs). The validator duplicate_identity alert is a false positive caused by the shared coarse identity key route_bx41.
